components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA on docs homepage and install sections.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #4A9EFF; color: #fff; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.12), 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.62 0.19 220 / 0.35); transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px oklch(0.62 0.19 220 / 0.18); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4A9EFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Bento Feature Cell
components.description: Asymmetric feature cell on docs homepage.
components.html:
12 plugin tools

Full business ops API for Hermes sessions.
components.css: .ds-bento-cell { padding: 1.5rem 1.4rem; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #D8DEEA; background: #FFFFFF; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-bento-cell:hover { border-color: oklch(0.62 0.19 220 / 0.45); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-icon-well { width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 1rem; border-radius: 10px; color: #4A9EFF; background: oklch(0.62 0.19 220 / 0.1); } .ds-bento-title { margin: 0 0 0.45rem; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #2A3142; } .ds-bento-body { margin: 0; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #6B7589; }

components.name: Terminal Block
components.description: Install prompt terminal on docs homepage.
components.html:
hermes-install.prompt
Install HBO Plugin from the hbo-plugin repository.
components.css: .ds-terminal { border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.025 220); background: oklch(0.11 0.02 220); overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.25); } .ds-terminal-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; padding: 0.65rem 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.25 0.02 220); background: oklch(0.13 0.022 220); } .ds-dot { width: 0.55rem; height: 0.55rem; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.35 0.02 220); } .ds-terminal-label { margin-left: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Source Code Pro', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; color: oklch(0.55 0.02 220); } .ds-terminal-body { margin: 0; padding: 1.25rem 1.35rem; font-family: 'Source Code Pro', monospace; font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.65; color: oklch(0.82 0.02 220); }

narrative.overview: HBO Plugin looks like serious infrastructure documentation for people who run agents in production. Crisp type, tinted cool neutrals, one blue accent, layouts that teach the operating loop.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every gray carries a trace of hue 220. No pure black or white.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Blue is the only saturated brand color on marketing pages.

rules.name: The Mono Labels Rule
rules.body: Uppercase mono eyebrows at most once per three homepage sections.

rules.name: The Flat Section Rule
rules.body: Section backgrounds alternate via surface tokens, not heavy shadows on every block.

dos: Do use OKLCH tokens from apps/docs/src/css/custom.css
Do vary section layout families on the homepage
Do use inline SVG icons from icons.tsx
donts: Don't use emoji as feature icons
Don't ship hero metric templates or identical card grids
Don't use gradient text or side-stripe borders
Don't apply marketing layouts to the Business Ops dashboard
